publicBoundary: Public-safe provider/model source cache. This is not a private routing policy, account entitlement record, pricing ledger, secret store, customer-data source, or provider-worker implementation guide.

providers.label: OpenAI
cacheUse: Check officially documented model names and model classes before relying on a model label.
Check official pricing before making cost-tier claims.
Use official docs before treating a model as suitable for coding, reasoning, tools, or long-context work.
mustRecheckBefore: using a newly named OpenAI model in automation
publishing or acting on pricing/context-window claims
making production or budget decisions from cached model attributes
observations: OpenAI model facts are volatile; official docs control.
Social rumors or internal shorthand should not be used as operational proof.

providers.label: Anthropic
cacheUse: Check officially documented Claude model families and message API behavior.
Check official pricing before making cost-tier claims.
Use higher-capability Claude-family models only when task risk justifies the spend.
mustRecheckBefore: routing automated review to a specific Claude model
publishing or acting on pricing/context-window claims
observations: Direct Anthropic availability and aggregator availability are different claims.
Official Anthropic docs control direct API model behavior.

providers.label: Straico
cacheUse: Refresh an authenticated model catalog before routing by model id through Straico.
Preserve the underlying model perspective when using Straico-mediated multi-model review.
Use cheap models for well-defined tasks only after task-quality checks prove the result is good enough.
mustRecheckBefore: routing work to a specific Straico model id
claiming a model family is currently available through Straico
using cached catalog data for cost or quality decisions
observations: Unauthenticated GET /v2/models returned HTTP 401 when checked on 2026-06-16.
Private account entitlements, model list, balances, prices, and usage limits must not be committed here.

providers.label: xAI / Grok
cacheUse: Check official xAI API documentation before relying on model names, endpoints, pricing metadata, or request shape.
Use GET /v1/models for a fresh model catalog before routing automated work to a specific Grok model.
Use POST /v1/chat/completions only through reviewed provider-worker code that preserves prompts, responses, and spend posture in private operational records.
mustRecheckBefore: routing automated work to a specific Grok model id
publishing or acting on pricing/context-window claims
enabling direct execution from a new runner or worker adapter
observations: Official xAI docs describe an OpenAI-compatible REST surface under https://api.x.ai/v1.
Private account balances, entitlements, API keys, and usage limits must not be committed here.
